title: Planning flow is created for approved ideas
description: A Yes or Now idea produces a planning artifact that summarizes scope, dependencies, tests, and recommended execution mode.

ideas.notes: Data handler is registered and accessible via API

planningArtifacts.notes: Data handler is registered and accessible via API

recordSwipe.notes: Action handler is NOT registered in root worker.ts - it only exists in autopilot/worker.ts

swipeSection.notes: The SwipeSection with Yes/Now swipe buttons was not visible in the current UI view. May require scrolling to find.

planningArtifactSection.notes: Planning artifact creation section was not observed in the visible UI.

issues.description: The recordSwipe action handler is NOT registered in root worker.ts. It exists in autopilot/worker.ts but not in the root worker entry point.
issues.impact: Cannot swipe ideas via API to transition them to approved/now status. The createPlanningArtifact action is also not verified as accessible.

issues.description: Ideas data handler and planningArtifacts data handler ARE now registered and return 200 from the API.
issues.impact: Data fetching works, but action to trigger planning artifact creation is missing.

verdictReason: Data handlers for ideas and planningArtifacts are correctly registered and return 200. However, the recordSwipe action handler is NOT registered, preventing the full flow (swipe idea -> create planning artifact) from being tested. The flow is partially implemented but the critical recordSwipe action is missing from the root worker entry point.
recommendation: Register the recordSwipe action handler in root worker.ts and verify createPlanningArtifact action is also accessible. Then re-test the full flow: add idea, swipe Yes/Now, verify planning artifact created.
